Homebrew Formulae

geeqie

Install command:

Lightweight Gtk+ based image viewer

https://www.geeqie.org/

License: GPL-2.0-or-later

Development: Pull requests

Formula JSON API: /api/formula/geeqie.json

Formula code: geeqie.rb on GitHub

Bottle (binary package) installation support provided for:

macOS on
Apple Silicon		 tahoe ✅
sequoia ✅
sonoma ✅
macOS on
Intel		 sonoma ✅
Linux ARM64 ✅
x86_64 ✅

Current versions:

stable ✅ 2.7

Revision: 1

Depends on:

adwaita-icon-theme 50.0 Icons for the GNOME project
cairo 1.18.4 Vector graphics library with cross-device output support
djvulibre 3.5.30 DjVu viewer
exiv2 0.28.8 EXIF and IPTC metadata manipulation library and tools
ffmpegthumbnailer 2.3.0 Create thumbnails for your video files
gdk-pixbuf 2.44.6 Toolkit for image loading and pixel buffer manipulation
glib 2.88.1 Core application library for C
gspell 1.14.3 Flexible API to implement spellchecking in GTK+ applications
gtk+3 3.24.52 Toolkit for creating graphical user interfaces
imagemagick 7.1.2-25 Tools and libraries to manipulate images in select formats
imath 3.2.2 Library of 2D and 3D vector, matrix, and math operations
jpeg-turbo 3.1.4.1 JPEG image codec that aids compression and decompression
jpeg-xl 0.11.2 New file format for still image compression
libarchive 3.8.7 Multi-format archive and compression library
libheif 1.23.0 ISO/IEC 23008-12:2017 HEIF file format decoder and encoder
libraw 0.22.1 Library for reading RAW files from digital photo cameras
libtiff 4.7.1 TIFF library and utilities
little-cms2 2.19 Color management engine supporting ICC profiles
openexr 3.4.13 High dynamic-range image file format
openjpeg 2.5.4 Library for JPEG-2000 image manipulation
pango 1.57.1 Framework for layout and rendering of i18n text
poppler 26.06.0 PDF rendering library (based on the xpdf-3.0 code base)
webp 1.6.0 Image format providing lossless and lossy compression for web images
gettext 1.0 GNU internationalization (i18n) and localization (l10n) library

Depends on when building from source:

gettext 1.0 GNU internationalization (i18n) and localization (l10n) library
meson 1.11.1 Fast and user friendly build system
ninja 1.13.2 Small build system for use with gyp or CMake
pkgconf 2.5.1 Package compiler and linker metadata toolkit
